description: Implement src/tools/discovery.ts registering 3 tools. list_components: calls listAllComponents(config), returns formatted text. find_component: NEW, not in Helix — semantic search using token-overlap scoring: tokenize query, score each component by (tag name matches x3) + (description matches x2) + (member name matches x1), return top 3 with scores above zero. get_library_summary: NEW — aggregates CEM component count, reads health-history dir if it exists for average score and grade distribution, returns last check timestamp. Write tests/tools/discovery.test.ts FIRST — test find_component scoring logic thoroughly (exact match, partial match, zero results, query that matches member names). These are pure functions — easy to test.
title: Discovery tools — list_components, find_component, get_library_summary
